hypothesis.thesis_statement: In A-shares, higher Probability of Informed Trading predicts higher cross-sectional forward returns (US predictor 'ProbInformedTrading', Easley, Hvidkjaer and O'Hara 2002, JF). Test whether this published US anomaly ports to A-shares.
hypothesis.mechanism: OSAP economic category: liquidity. Proposed A-share build: price+vol+amount -> 'osap_probinformedtrading_ashare'. Definition (US): Download parameter estimates from the archived version of Hvidkjaers website (https://web.archive.org/web/20110219024112/http://sites.google.com/site/hvidkjaer/data/data-files/pin1983-2001.zip?attredirects=0), and the page for Duarte, Hu, Young, JFE 2020 https://edwinhu.github.io

pre_registered_concerns.most_likely_failure_mode: [DRAFT] The US 'ProbInformedTrading' effect may not survive A-share microstructure (T+1, limit boards, retail-dominated flow) or may be subsumed by existing liq factors after neutralization.
pre_registered_concerns.weakest_assumption: [DRAFT] That the US accounting/price construction maps faithfully to Tushare A-share fields without definitional drift.
pre_registered_concerns.what_would_falsify_this: [DRAFT] Sealed-OOS rank-ICIR below the committed band, or hard rules failing after realistic costs.
pre_registered_concerns.priors_on_cost_sensitivity: [DRAFT] Review turnover at the chosen rebalance before committing.

todo_before_registering: Implement factor 'osap_probinformedtrading_ashare' in factor_library (map US definition -> A-share Tushare/Qlib fields; PIT-safe Ref(...,1)).
CONFIRM not a duplicate of existing catalog factors in category 'liq' (heuristic flag = REVIEW).
SET expected_effect = YOUR A-share prediction (point + CI + horizon). Do NOT copy us_evidence_context_only above.
CONFIRM the OOS window is unburned for this design before registering.
